title: Execution String Aggregate Telemetry v1
description: Aggregation schema summarizing execution_string (instant-fail death cinematic) behavior per executionId and executionKind.

version.description: Schema version for this aggregate record.

schemaRef.description: Logical schema reference for routing and validation.

recordedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this aggregate was computed.

executionId.description: Stable identifier of the execution_string cinematic or pattern summarized by this aggregate.

executionKind.description: High-level category of the execution, matching execution-string-run.v1.

tier.description: Content tier for this aggregate, aligned with spine tiers.

counters.description: Attempt and gate counters over all runs in this group.

attempts.description: Total number of execution_string runs considered.

allowed.description: Number of runs where the full execution_string cinematic was allowed.

downgraded.description: Number of runs where the gate downgraded to a partial or non-lethal alternative.

safety.description: Aggregate counts of safety-related violations for this execution.

detOverflows.description: Number of runs where DET exceeded its configured cap during the event window.

cdlOverflows.description: Number of runs where CDL exceeded its configured cap during the event window.

arrTooLow.description: Number of runs where ARR after the event fell below the configured floor.

scores.description: Aggregate localScore statistics for this execution.

deltas.description: Average realized metric deltas for this execution group.

avgDeltaUEC.description: Average change in UEC across runs (UEC_after - UEC_before).

avgDeltaARR.description: Average change in ARR across runs (ARR_after - ARR_before).

avgDeltaDET.description: Average DET contribution estimate for this execution, if logged.

rwfHint.description: Reliability hint synthesized from scores and safety behavior.

rwfScore.description: Reliability weight factor 0–1 for this execution.

telemetryWindow.description: Optional window metadata describing which runs were included.

from.description: Inclusive start of the aggregation window.

to.description: Inclusive end of the aggregation window.

runCount.description: Number of execution-string-run records actually ingested.

origin.description: Optional linkage back to design-time contracts or bundles.

seedId.description: Seed or event identifier this execution is primarily associated with.

schemaRef.description: Canonical schemaRef of the originating contract, if known.

extras.description: Extension point for lab or project-specific fields. Tier-1 consumers must ignore.
